title: Setup
text: Setup Determines whether the Uniface Setup utility is available from the system menu in the title bar. setup = Undefined | True | False Value Description "" Undefined. Use default. True The Uniface Setup utility is available from the system menu. False The Uniface Setup utility is not available from the system menu. Usage Dependencies: The System Menu property must be True . Description The Setup utility can be used to change selected initialization settings in usys.ini without restarting the Uniface desktop application. For more information, see Setup Utility . Note: The Setup utility is not available in the Uniface IDE. Applies To Application Shells for Desktop Applications (Windows only) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
